note: Split from MPI-247 symptom (b). History-workspace op revert. Distinct mechanism from (a); under-specified, needs repro. Trace attached in description.

MPI-247 (op-persistence fix, commit 0998b18d, USER-VERIFIED) now covers the History nav-revert AND History model-switch-revert this card was hedging on. Remaining unique scope = ONLY the narrow generation:complete mask-clear-then-fallback case (L613-614): a mask-required op (inpaint) loses its mask after an upscale completes and falls back to i2i. That is arguably CORRECT (inpaint cannot run without a mask). Keep open only for that; needs a decision, not urgent. Not a general revert bug anymore.

summary: todo->done (FALSE POSITIVE, no code change). User-confirmed not a bug: the History op dropdown does NOT flip on completion but the instant a mask-required op (Detail) is launched. Root: Detail has requiresMask:true (commandRegistry L160); launching it consumes/clears the drawn mask, _refreshOpOptions sees Detail disabled and falls to first runnable op (i2i) at MpiGroupHistoryBlock L772-777. No mask => no Detail => falling back to a runnable op is correct + self-heals when a new mask is drawn. User re-tested Upscale (pid, no requiresMask) and Pose Reference: NEITHER flips -- the other two symptoms were already handled by the MPI-247 fix. Closing as designed behavior.
